subcodes.first_line: O friends, O faithful ones! His honor Ismu'llah hath, in his letter, made mention of the friends and praised them all [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دوستان ای راستان حضرت اسم الله در نامه خود ذکر یارانرا نمود و از کل ستایش
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @prayer for pioneers and travel teachers, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @thankfulness; gratitude, @praise and encouragement, @humility; meekness; lowliness
